detail.note: Non-signal METADATA (emitted_at, process.signed/path/pid/user, agent/host id, event_id) does not separate ATTACK vs BENIGN, and no ground-truth label leaks into a consumed field. SIGNAL fields (format_valid/entropy/header/type-change/op_window/canary) ARE allowed to separate — that is detection. A classifier must fuse real signals, not memorize a fiat field.
